ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the book */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the book (e.g., fiction, non-fiction, romance) */,
  "ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings for the book */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the book on the bestseller list */,
  "time_on_list" INTEGER /* Number of days the book has spent on the bestseller list */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number for unique identification */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the book was published */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the e-book (e.g., PDF, EPUB, MOBI) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the book */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the book */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the book's cover image */,
  "is_pre_order" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the book is available for pre-order */,
  "is_best_seller" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the book is a bestseller */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the book (calculated from reviews) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the author's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON field to store links to the author's social media accounts */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the author is active on the platform */,
  "total_books_published" INTEGER /* Total number of books published by the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user leaving the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the review is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pre_orders" (
  "pre_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pre-order */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being pre-ordered */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the book */,
  "pre_order_price" REAL /* Price of the pre-order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of copies pre-ordered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pre-order (e.g., pending, confirmed, shipped) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the pre-order */,
  "is_refundable" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the pre-order is refundable */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery for the pre-ordered book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pre_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pre_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pre_orders_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., reader, author, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON field to store user preferences (e.g., favorite genres, reading history) */,
  "reading_history" TEXT /* JSON field to store a list of books the user has read */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user is banned from the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the publisher's official website */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the publisher is active on the platform */,
  "total_books_published" INTEGER /* Total number of books published by the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., fiction, non-fiction, romance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_genres" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id", "genre_id")
)
